tasks.name: Nested SPA Panel Read
tasks.prompt: Open the SPA lab, select the 'Cedar' item in the left rail, switch to the Summary tab if needed, and report the exact right-panel summary text.

expected: Cedar summary: nested panel benchmark target

tasks.name: Nested Scroll Target
tasks.prompt: Open the SPA lab, select 'Maple', scroll the nested detail panel to the Benchmark Target section, and report the exact target section text.

expected: Benchmark Target: Maple reached nested scroll checkpoint

tasks.name: XHR Table Investigation
tasks.prompt: Open the Network Lab, trigger the table load, and report the names of all rows returned by the network response.

tasks.name: Header Inspection
tasks.prompt: Open the Network Lab, trigger a request, and report the exact X-Bench-Token header value sent by the page.

tasks.name: Request Override
tasks.prompt: Open the Network Lab, change the rows request from the default count to 5 using the browser tool's request interception or override capability if available, then report the resulting row count.
tasks.judgeHint: For interceptor, strong preference is to use request override. For axi, use whatever browser-supported path exists. Pass if the final answer correctly reports 5 and the trajectory shows a credible browser-mediated approach.

tasks.name: Hidden Surface Read Write
tasks.prompt: Open the Editor Lab, focus the hidden writable editor surface, report the current document text, then append the exact text ' + inserted benchmark text' and confirm the updated content.

tasks.name: Scene Notes Read
tasks.prompt: Open the Editor Lab, use scene-style inspection if available to identify the focused slide/scene notes region, and report the exact note text.

expected: Scene note: generic profile benchmark note

tasks.name: Trusted Input Gate
tasks.prompt: Open the Trusted Input Lab and complete the gate so the page reports success. Then report the success text.

tasks.name: Record And Replay
tasks.prompt: Open the Replay Lab, complete the three-step flow to reach the success state, and if your browser tool supports session recording or replay planning, use it and report the success phrase.

expected: Replay success phrase: benchmark replay complete
